final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustrated infographic explaining the definitions and relationships between AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, Distillation, and CLI, designed for educational clarity with a hand-drawn aesthetic.

Style/medium: hand-drawn educational infographic with the approachable warmth of a sketched whiteboard explanation, pen-and-paper honesty with soft ink textures
Composition: central hub-and-spoke diagram with AI at the center, connected concepts radiating outward in clear visual clusters, supporting panels for definitions
Subject: 
  - AI: central node, foundational concept
  - MCP: protocol layer connecting AI to external tools
  - AI Agent: autonomous entity using AI to perform tasks
  - OpenClaw: tool/framework reference
  - AI Skill: modular capability unit for AI systems
  - Distillation: knowledge compression technique
  - CLI: command-line interface for interaction
  - Relationship arrows showing hierarchy and dependencies
Scene/backdrop: clean off-white paper texture with subtle grid lines suggesting a notebook page
Lighting/mood: the clear daylight of a focused learning moment, approachable and unintimidating
Color palette: warm graphite and soft ink blacks with one gentle accent color (muted teal or amber) for emphasis and relationship lines
Materials/textures: ballpoint pen lines with the slight wobble of real handwriting, soft paper grain, gentle marker fills
Text (verbatim): AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI — all concept labels preserved in their original form
Constraints: all 7 concepts must be visually present, definitions must be readable, relationship arrows must clearly indicate direction and hierarchy
Avoid: overly polished digital aesthetic, cluttered layout, illegible small text, decorative elements that obscure information hierarchy
